title: Glassy-Jelly Jamaican Sour Cream Burger
description: Inspired by the flavors of Jamaica, this unique burger features a sweet and tangy glassy-jelly topping paired with the creaminess of sour cream and the spice of bhuna. Perfect for a weekend brunch.

ingredients.name: bhuna chicken sausage
ingredients.notes: make sure to choose a gluten-free option

instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a small saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion, minced garlic, and finely chopped jalapeno pepper to the saucepan and saut8 until softened.
Add the ground cinnamon and allspice to the saucepan and cook for another minute.
Add the brown sugar to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, grill the chicken sausage until cooked through.
Split the english muffins in half and toast on the grill or in a toaster.

Assemble the burgers by spreading a dollop of sour cream on the bottom half of the english muffin, followed by a grilled chicken sausage, a spoonful of the glassy-jelly topping, and finally the top half of the english muffin.
Repeat the process for the remaining burgers.
Place the burgers on a serving platter and garnish with chopped onion and a sprinkle of cinnamon.
